overall.description: Static third-person view of students in wizard robes gathered in a covered stone pavilion with heavy timber framing, likely from a high-fidelity video game. Natural sunlight streams through the large archway opening to grassy grounds outside as characters mill about wooden tables and benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pavilion courtyard of a magic school

events.description: a student in dark robes walks through the background archway from left to right, entering and exiting the view

agents.ego_description: standing still in the covered pavilion among other students, facing toward the courtyard

notable_agents.action: student in foreground with yellow-trimmed robes standing near the wooden table
student walking through the distant archway from left to right

entered.detail: massive wooden beams and rafters forming the pavilion ceiling
thick stone columns supporting the roof structure
tall stone archway opening to the grassy grounds outside
long wooden table with students gathered around it
stone staircase leading up to an upper level
wooden notice board with papers attached on the right wall
green plants in pots along the left side

segments.scene_description: A static view of a covered stone pavilion with heavy timber framing where students in wizard robes gather around wooden tables. Sunlight streams through the large central archway revealing grassy grounds outside, while a student walks through the distant archway and others mill about the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective of a bustling academic sanctuary where students in wizard robes gather within a stone pavilion. It begins with a wide view of the heavy timber framing and wooden tables, capturing the quiet energy of students milling about the space. As the eye is drawn toward the light, the scene emphasizes the contrast between the shaded interior and the brilliant sunlight streaming through the large central archway. The focus then shifts toward the distant grassy grounds outside as a lone student walks through the opening, bridging the gap between the sheltered pavilion and the open landscape.
